As in his Gospel, John does not name himself, but for this Epistle he begins with his credentials. He was one of those who had seen, and examined, and touched the eternal life which was with the Father (see Acts 1:21). The first verse connects exactly with the first two verses of John's Gospel. "In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God" (John 1:1, 2). (Robert…
